=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 6 falling damage. HP: 172/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===

Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 33 damage. Kobold — Armored Tank HP: 26/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Kobold — Armored Tank HP: 4/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Kobold — Armored Tank's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kobold — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Kobold — Armored Tank.
→ Kobold — Armored Tank healed for 8 HP. HP: 12/59
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 14 damage. Kobold — Armored Tank HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
